pre_game.message: Hey, I'm C — nice to meet you. How are you feeling about the game, any strategies or rituals you usually follow?
I'm nervous but determined — I lost a lot recently so I'm focused; no rituals, I try to stay calm, read people, and pounce on hesitation.
I'm sorry to hear that — staying calm and reading people is smart; I'll be observant too. Good luck.
Thanks—I appreciate it. Good luck to you too; stay sharp and may the best player win.
Thanks — you too. Hope your luck turns around; stay sharp out there.
Thanks, I appreciate that — means a lot. Good luck to you too; let's both stay sharp and play smart.
Absolutely — you too. Stay focused and good luck out there.
Thanks, C — appreciate it. Stay sharp and may the best player win.
Thanks, D — same to you. Let's play smart and good luck.
Thanks, C — you too. Stay sharp and good luck.
Thanks, D — appreciate it. I'll stay sharp and play fair.
